description: 场景属性层配置草案。用于定义可扩展的属性空间、现有原型场景的属性向量，以及后续 CLIP 属性打分可参考的提示词。

arousal.description: 场景唤醒度/动感强度。越高表示越活跃、越具运动感。
positive_prompts: an energetic, dynamic, active environment
a lively scene with movement, action, and intensity
a high-energy place for exercise, dancing, or excitement
negative_prompts: a calm, still, low-energy environment
a quiet place with little movement or activity
a peaceful scene for resting or slowing down

socialness.description: 社交密度/互动感。越高表示越适合交流、聚会或共同活动。
socialness.music_effect_hint: 提升流行感、律动感，弱化器乐独奏倾向
positive_prompts: a social place where people gather, talk, or interact
a lively shared environment with group activity
a public place designed for meeting, chatting, or hanging out
negative_prompts: a solitary place with little social interaction
a quiet personal environment for being alone
an isolated scene with no sense of gathering or community

focus.description: 专注导向。越高表示越适合阅读、学习、深度工作。
positive_prompts: a quiet place for reading, studying, or concentrated work
an environment designed for focus, silence, and attention
a calm workspace for learning or deep thinking
negative_prompts: a noisy and distracting place for social activity
a chaotic environment where concentration is difficult
a loud place full of interruptions and stimulation

relaxation.description: 放松感/舒缓感。越高表示越柔和、越适合休息与慢节奏陪伴。
positive_prompts: a relaxing, peaceful, comfortable environment
a slow and soothing place for unwinding
a calm atmosphere that feels soft and restful
negative_prompts: a tense, intense, or stressful environment
a rushed place with pressure and fast activity
an overstimulating scene that does not feel restful

nature.description: 自然感。越高表示越偏自然景观、植被、天空、山水等元素。
positive_prompts: a natural outdoor environment with mountains, trees, sky, and landscape
a scenic place dominated by nature rather than buildings
an open-air environment with strong natural elements
negative_prompts: an indoor or highly artificial man-made environment
a dense urban space with little natural scenery
a constructed environment dominated by buildings and infrastructure

urban.description: 都市感/人造环境感。越高表示越偏城市、商业、建筑和夜生活氛围。
positive_prompts: a modern urban environment with buildings, streets, and city activity
a man-made city scene with strong metropolitan atmosphere
a commercial or public space shaped by architecture and infrastructure
negative_prompts: a rural or natural environment away from the city
a landscape with little urban structure or artificial design
a wild outdoor place with minimal signs of city life

night.description: 夜晚感/暗色氛围。越高表示越偏夜间、暗光和人工灯源环境。
night.music_effect_hint: 提升 r&b、chill、synthwave 倾向，valence 可略降
positive_prompts: a dark nighttime scene with artificial lights
an evening or night environment with shadows and city glow
a low-light scene after sunset
negative_prompts: a bright daytime scene under natural light
a sunlit environment in broad daylight
a daytime place with clear bright illumination

openness.description: 空间开阔度。越高表示视野更开阔、空间更外向。
openness.music_effect_hint: 适配更铺展、开阔的听感和编排
positive_prompts: a wide open space with long sight lines and spacious feeling
an expansive environment with visible distance and openness
a broad scene that feels airy and unconstrained
negative_prompts: a cramped, enclosed, or narrow environment
a small indoor space with limited visual openness
a confined scene with little sense of expansion

warmth.description: 温暖亲和感。越高表示越舒适、柔和、有人情味。
warmth.music_effect_hint: 提升 valence，偏柔和舒适风格
positive_prompts: a warm, cozy, inviting atmosphere
a comfortable place with soft lighting and emotional warmth
an intimate environment that feels welcoming and gentle
negative_prompts: a cold, distant, or impersonal atmosphere
a harsh environment that feels emotionally detached
a sterile or unfriendly place without warmth

cafe.description: 咖啡厅 / 安静放松、轻社交、轻度工作

study_room.description: 书房/学习空间 / 低能量、高专注、安静稳定

gym.description: 健身房 / 高能量、快节奏、激励型运动环境

night_street.description: 夜晚街道 / 都市夜色、中等能量、冷感沉浸

mountain.description: 山地/户外自然场景 / 开阔、自然、略带力量感

prototype_match.description: 图像先映射到属性向量，再与原型场景属性向量做最近邻匹配，用于解释和展示，不作为唯一决策入口。

notes: 优先将属性向量作为推荐系统的核心输入。
原型场景主要用于初始化、可视化解释和最近邻展示。
新增场景时优先复用现有属性空间，不优先扩充固定类别词表。
